Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 9, 2026

1. Who We Are

Burleson Brunch House is a family-owned restaurant at 2650 SW Wilshire Blvd, Burleson, TX 76028. This page explains what information we collect when you visit our website and how we use it.

2. Information We Collect

If you fill out a form on our site, we collect what you type in, which may include:

  • Your name, email address, and phone number when you contact us or request a reservation.
  • Your preferred visit date and party size when making a reservation inquiry.
  • Any messages or notes you include in your contact form submissions.

We may also collect basic technical information automatically when you visit, like your browser type and general location. This data is not tied to your name or any other personal details.

3. How We Use Your Information

We use what you share with us to:

  • Respond to your reservation requests, inquiries, and messages.
  • Improve our website and dining experience.
  • Comply with legal obligations where applicable.

We do not sell or share your personal information with other companies. We won't use it to send you marketing emails you didn't ask for.

4. Cookies

Our site may use basic cookies. They don't collect any personal information. You can turn them off in your browser settings and the site will still work fine.

5. Data Retention

We only keep contact form messages as long as we need to respond to you. We don't store any payment information. All payments are handled in person at the restaurant.

6. Third-Party Services

Our site uses tools like Google Fonts and Google Maps. These have their own privacy policies and may collect basic usage data on their end. If that concerns you, it's worth taking a look at their policies directly.

7. Children's Privacy

Our site is not intended for children under 13. We don't knowingly collect information from minors. If you think we have, please reach out and we'll take care of it right away.

8. Your Rights

You can ask to see, update, or delete any personal information we have on file for you. Just reach out using the contact info at the bottom of this page.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy from time to time. When we do, we'll change the date at the top of this page. Continuing to use the site after that means you're good with the updated version.

10. Contact Us

Questions about this policy? Get in touch:

Burleson Brunch House

2650 SW Wilshire Blvd, Burleson, TX 76028

(682) 730-1391
Burleson Brunch House

Family-owned and right here in Burleson, Texas. Breakfast and lunch every day of the week.
